message:
test(widgets): Add proptest property tests for TextArea

Add 4 property tests: insert_delete_inverse, undo_redo_inverse,
cursor_always_valid (random navigation ops), selection_ordered.
TextArea now has 46 tests total including unit + property tests.

Part of bd-6e9.9 (Bubbles Widget Test Suite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
